spec.brief: fir_decimate_asym is an Asymmetric Decimation FIR filter

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to and output from the filter function.

parameters.name: TT_COEFF
parameters.description: describes the type of individual coefficients of the filter taps.

parameters.name: TP_FIR_LEN
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of taps in the filter.

parameters.name: TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the decimation factor of the filter, the ratio of input to output samples.

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of FIR terms before output.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE
parameters.description: describes the number of samples processed by the graph in a single iteration run.

parameters.name: TP_CASC_LEN
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE processors to split the operation over.

parameters.name: TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD
parameters.description: allows the user to select if runtime coefficient reloading should be used.

parameters.name: TP_NUM_OUTPUTS
parameters.description: sets the number of ports over which the output is sent.

parameters.name: TP_DUAL_IP
parameters.description: allows 2 stream inputs to be connected to FIR, increasing available throughput.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: specifies if the input/output interface should be window-based or stream-based.

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: specifies the number of parallel input/output paths where samples are interleaved between paths, giving an overall higher throughput.

parameters.name: TP_PARA_DECI_POLY
parameters.description: specifies the number of decimator polyphases that will be split up and executed in a series of pipelined cascade stages, resulting in additional input paths.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

ports.type: port_array<input, IN_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_asym::fir_decimate_asym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::in
ports.name: in

ports.type: port_array<output, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_asym::fir_decimate_asym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::out
ports.name: out

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_DUAL_IP == 1), IN_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_asym::fir_decimate_asym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::in2
ports.name: in2

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_asym::fir_decimate_asym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::coeff
ports.name: coeff

ports.type: port_conditional_array<output, (TP_NUM_OUTPUTS == 2), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_asym::fir_decimate_asym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::out2
ports.name: out2

spec.brief: fir_decimate_hb is a Halfband Decimation FIR filter

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to and output from the filter function.

parameters.name: TT_COEFF
parameters.description: describes the type of individual coefficients of the filter taps.

parameters.name: TP_FIR_LEN
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of taps in the filter.

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of FIR terms before output.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE
parameters.description: describes the number of samples processed by the graph in a single iteration run.

parameters.name: TP_CASC_LEN
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE processors to split the operation over.

parameters.name: TP_DUAL_IP
parameters.description: allows 2 input ports to be connected to FIR, increasing available throughput.

parameters.name: TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD
parameters.description: allows the user to select if runtime coefficient reloading should be used.

parameters.name: TP_NUM_OUTPUTS
parameters.description: sets the number of ports over which the output is sent.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: specifies if the input/output interface should be window-based or stream-based.

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: specifies the number of parallel input/output paths where samples are interleaved between paths, giving an overall higher throughput.

parameters.name: TP_PARA_DECI_POLY
parameters.description: specifies the number of distinct input data phases into which the input stream will be split. In each stream computations are performed in parallel and the outputs are combined into a single output stream.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

ports.type: port_array<input, TP_SSR * TP_PARA_DECI_POLY> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_hb::fir_decimate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::in
ports.name: in

ports.type: port_array<output, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_hb::fir_decimate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::out
ports.name: out

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_DUAL_IP == 1), TP_SSR * TP_PARA_DECI_POLY> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_hb::fir_decimate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::in2
ports.name: in2

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_hb::fir_decimate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::coeff
ports.name: coeff

ports.type: port_conditional_array<output, (TP_NUM_OUTPUTS == 2), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::decimate_hb::fir_decimate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::out2
ports.name: out2

spec.brief: fir_interpolate_hb is a Halfband Interpolation FIR filter

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to and output from the filter function.

parameters.name: TT_COEFF
parameters.description: describes the type of individual coefficients of the filter taps.

parameters.name: TP_FIR_LEN
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of taps in the filter.

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of FIR terms before output.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE
parameters.description: describes the number of samples processed by the graph in a single iteration run.

parameters.name: TP_CASC_LEN
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE processors to split the operation over.

parameters.name: TP_DUAL_IP
parameters.description: allows 2 input ports to be connected to FIR, increasing available throughput.

parameters.name: TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD
parameters.description: allows the user to select if runtime coefficient reloading should be used.

parameters.name: TP_NUM_OUTPUTS
parameters.description: sets the number of ports over which the output is sent.

parameters.name: TP_UPSHIFT_CT
parameters.description: upshift unit center tap.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: specifies if the input/output interface should be window-based or stream-based.

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: specifies the number of parallel input/output paths where samples are interleaved between paths, giving an overall higher throughput.

parameters.name: TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY
parameters.description: sets the number of interpolator polyphases over which the coefficients will be split to enable parallel computation of the outputs. The polyphases are executed in parallel, output data is produced by each polyphase directly.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

ports.type: port_array<input, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::in

ports.name: out

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_DUAL_IP == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::in2
ports.name: in2

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::coeff
ports.name: coeff

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::coeffCT
ports.name: coeffCT

ports.type: port_conditional_array<output, (TP_NUM_OUTPUTS == 2), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::out2
ports.name: out2

ports.type: port_conditional_array<output, (TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY > 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::out3
ports.name: out3

ports.type: port_conditional_array<output, (TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY > 1 && TP_NUM_OUTPUTS == 2), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::interpolate_hb::fir_interpolate_hb_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_UPSHIFT_CT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_SAT >::out4
ports.name: out4

spec.brief: fir_resampler is a generic asymmetric FIR filter that can do fractional and integer interpolation and decimation.

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to and output from the filter function.

parameters.name: TT_COEFF
parameters.description: describes the type of individual coefficients of the filter taps.

parameters.name: TP_FIR_LEN
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of taps in the filter.

parameters.name: TP_INTERPOLATE_FACTOR
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the interpolation factor of the filter.

parameters.name: TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the decimation factor of the filter. TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR must be in the range 2 to 16.

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of FIR terms before output.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE
parameters.description: describes the number of samples processed by the graph in a single iteration run.

parameters.name: TP_CASC_LEN
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE processors to split the operation over.

parameters.name: TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD
parameters.description: allows the user to select if runtime coefficient reloading should be used.

parameters.name: TP_NUM_OUTPUTS
parameters.description: sets the number of ports over which the output is sent.

parameters.name: TP_DUAL_IP
parameters.description: allows 2 stream inputs to be connected to FIR, increasing available throughput.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: specifies if the input/output interface should be window-based or stream-based.

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: specifies the number of parallel input paths where samples are interleaved between paths, giving an overall higher throughput.

parameters.name: TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY
parameters.description: sets the number of interpolator polyphases over which the coefficients will be split to enable parallel computation of the outputs.

parameters.name: TP_PARA_DECI_POLY
parameters.description: specifies the number of decimator polyphases that will be split up and executed in a series of pipelined cascade stages, resulting in additional input paths.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

ports.type: port_array<input, IN_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::resampler::fir_resampler_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_INTERPOLATE_FACTOR, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::in
ports.name: in

ports.type: port_array<output, OUT_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::resampler::fir_resampler_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_INTERPOLATE_FACTOR, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::out
ports.name: out

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_DUAL_IP == 1), IN_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::resampler::fir_resampler_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_INTERPOLATE_FACTOR, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::in2
ports.name: in2

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), TP_SSR * TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY> xf::dsp::aie::fir::resampler::fir_resampler_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_INTERPOLATE_FACTOR, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::coeff
ports.name: coeff

ports.type: port_conditional_array<output, (TP_NUM_OUTPUTS == 2), OUT_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::resampler::fir_resampler_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_INTERPOLATE_FACTOR, TP_DECIMATE_FACTOR, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_PARA_INTERP_POLY, TP_PARA_DECI_POLY, TP_SAT >::out2
ports.name: out2

spec.brief: fir_sr_sym is a Symmetrical Single Rate FIR filter

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to and output from the filter function.

parameters.name: TT_COEFF
parameters.description: describes the type of individual coefficients of the filter taps.

parameters.name: TP_FIR_LEN
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of taps in the filter.

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of FIR terms before output.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE
parameters.description: describes the number of samples processed by the graph in a single iteration run.

parameters.name: TP_CASC_LEN
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE processors to split the operation over.

parameters.name: TP_DUAL_IP
parameters.description: allows 2 input ports to be connected to FIR, increasing available throughput.

parameters.name: TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD
parameters.description: allows the user to select if runtime coefficient reloading should be used.

parameters.name: TP_NUM_OUTPUTS
parameters.description: sets the number of ports over which the output is sent.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: specifies if the output interface should be window-based or stream-based.

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: specifies the number of parallel input/output paths where samples are interleaved between paths, giving an overall higher throughput.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

ports.type: port_array<input, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::sr_sym::fir_sr_sym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_SAT >::in
ports.name: in

ports.name: out

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_DUAL_IP == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::sr_sym::fir_sr_sym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_SAT >::in2
ports.name: in2

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::sr_sym::fir_sr_sym_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_CASC_LEN, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_SAT >::coeff
ports.name: coeff

ports.name: out2

spec.brief: fir_tdm is a Time-Division Multiplexing (TDM) FIR filter

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to the filter function.

parameters.name: TT_COEFF
parameters.description: describes the type of individual coefficients of the filter taps.

parameters.name: TP_FIR_LEN
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of taps in the filter.

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of FIR terms before output.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE
parameters.description: describes the number of samples processed by the graph in a single iteration run.

parameters.name: TP_TDM_CHANNELS
parameters.description: describes the number of TDM Channels processed by the FIR.

parameters.name: TP_NUM_OUTPUTS
parameters.description: sets the number of ports to broadcast the output to.

parameters.name: TP_DUAL_IP
parameters.description: allows 2 stream inputs to be connected to FIR, increasing available throughput.

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: specifies the number of parallel input/output paths where samples are interleaved between paths, giving an overall higher throughput.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_CASC_LEN
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE processors to split the operation over.

parameters.name: TT_OUT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of output data samples from the filter function.

parameters.name: TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD
parameters.description: allows the user to select if runtime coefficient reloading should be used.

ports.type: port_array<input, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::tdm::fir_tdm_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_TDM_CHANNELS, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_SSR, TP_SAT, TP_CASC_LEN, TT_OUT_DATA, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD >::in
ports.name: in

ports.type: port_array<output, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fir::tdm::fir_tdm_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_TDM_CHANNELS, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_SSR, TP_SAT, TP_CASC_LEN, TT_OUT_DATA, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD >::out
ports.name: out

ports.type: port_conditional_array<input, (TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD == 1), (TP_SSR * TP_CASC_LEN)> xf::dsp::aie::fir::tdm::fir_tdm_graph< TT_DATA, TT_COEFF, TP_FIR_LEN, TP_SHIFT, TP_RND, TP_INPUT_WINDOW_VSIZE, TP_TDM_CHANNELS, TP_NUM_OUTPUTS, TP_DUAL_IP, TP_SSR, TP_SAT, TP_CASC_LEN, TT_OUT_DATA, TP_USE_COEFF_RELOAD >::coeff
ports.name: coeff

spec.brief: vss_fft_ifft_1d is a single-channel, decomposed FFT that contains the AIE sub-part of the VSS FFT Mode 1 offering.

parameters.name: TT_DATA
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to and output from the transform function.

parameters.name: TT_TWIDDLE
parameters.description: describes the type of twiddle factors of the transform.

parameters.name: TP_POINT_SIZE
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of samples in the transform.

parameters.name: TP_FFT_NIFFT
parameters.description: selects whether the transform to perform is an FFT (1) or IFFT (0).

parameters.name: TP_SHIFT
parameters.description: selects the power of 2 to scale the result by prior to output.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer to select window (0) or stream (1) interfaces. When stream I/O is selected, one sample is taken from, or output to, a stream and the next sample from or two the next stream. Two streams minimum are used. In this example, even samples are read from input stream[0] and odd samples from input stream[1].

parameters.name: TP_SSR
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer to describe the number of parallel computational paths into which the implementation will be split to improve the performance. Higher SSR relates to higher performance.

parameters.name: TP_RND
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_SAT
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.

parameters.name: TP_TWIDDLE_MODE
parameters.description: describes the magnitude of integer twiddles. It has no effect for cfloat.

ports.type: port_array<input, TP_SSR> xf::dsp::aie::fft::vss_1d::vss_fft_ifft_1d_graph< TT_DATA, TT_TWIDDLE, TP_POINT_SIZE, TP_FFT_NIFFT, TP_SHIFT, TP_API, TP_SSR, TP_RND, TP_SAT, TP_TWIDDLE_MODE >::front_i
ports.name: front_i

ports.name: back_i

ports.name: back_o
